name: Credentials dump and resume tone — failure modes 4-5 from named-failure-modes
draft:
Hi Sarah,

My name is Alex Kalyvas and I am a Stanford GSB MBA candidate with 7 years of experience shipping AI products at Snowflake, Amazon, and IBM. At Snowflake I built the first multi-agent orchestration framework for Cloud Collaboration. At Amazon I led ML inventory ordering across 8 EU countries, saving $64M. At IBM I worked on Watson NLP.

I'm reaching out because I'd love to be considered for a Product Manager role at Stripe. My background spans AI infrastructure, agentic workflows, and enterprise SaaS. I'm also interested in fintech, B2B platforms, and developer tools.

Is there a 30-minute slot next Wednesday at 2pm Pacific that works for you to discuss potential opportunities?

Best,
Alex

expected_flags.quote_contains: AI infrastructure, agentic workflows, and enterprise SaaS
interested in fintech, B2B platforms, and developer tools
I'd love to be considered for a Product Manager role
